creator: fernape@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 145928
Patch to the ports tree

Update lang/basic256 to 1.1.3.0.

In addition, I added the LICENSE variable to the Makefile.

Note: Unlike other times, I don't provide the redports log file, since there seems to be some kind of problem and a lot of ports show just "finished" build status. See:

https://www.mail-archive.com/freebsd-ports@freebsd.org/msg60366.html
